summary: iter215 EchoWaste Video Capture Pipeline + Claude-readable Logging + SMS Admin testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Mobile WasteTab 7-mode selector with video default working, Desktop EchoWaste panel with 5 tabs including Analysis Logs fully functional.
test_credentials: Twilio AUTH_TOKEN is set, ACCOUNT_SID and FROM_NUMBER are empty - SMS queues correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test captures, draft recipes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter215 production-ready video capture pipeline features all working: (1) GET /api/waste/logs returns empty list with count=0 initially, accepts event_type/capture_id/entry_id/session_id/since query params; (2) After Claude vision call, logs show vision_llm entry with llm.provider, llm.model, llm.duration_ms, llm.mode, llm.system_prompt_hash, llm.user_prompt_preview, llm.response_raw_preview; (3) When Claude returns empty/unparseable, vision_llm_no_result AND vision_failed_no_stub log entries are written AND capture endpoint returns HTTP 502 (no silent stub); (4) GET /api/waste/logs/summary returns summary with total_events, by_event_type with count/errors/avg_ms/mode_mix, errors[], slow_calls[], captures with total/vision_ok/vision_failed, timing_percentiles_ms with p50/p90/p99/max; (5) GET /api/waste/admin/sms/status returns ok:true, credentials with configured:false/has_account_sid:false/has_auth_token:true/has_from_number:false, queued_count, sent_count; (6) POST /api/waste/admin/sms/flush returns ok:false, reason:no_credentials, flushed:0; (7) POST /api/waste/capture/video-mot with frames works - either real Claude call succeeds or returns 502 with details, logs capture_video_mot_start and capture_video_mot_done events; (8) Still capture WITHOUT media_base64 falls through to stub (backwards compat); (9) Draft recipe creates draft_recipe_extract log. Frontend: Mobile /m/waste has 7 modes (mode-video first + default-active, mode-still, mode-buffet-set, mode-buffet-refill, mode-buffet-close, mode-ground-truth, mode-draft-recipe), primary CTA reads '🎥 Record a video scan' by default, waste-video-input has accept='video/*' capture='environment'. Desktop EchoWaste panel has 5 tabs (Capture Hub, Entries, Par Sheet, Analysis Logs, Daily Digest), Analysis Logs renders logs-kpis, logs-by-event, logs-filter, logs-refresh, logs-claude-digest, logs-stream, logs-autorefresh.

backend_logs_endpoint.details: GET /api/waste/logs returns list with count, accepts event_type/capture_id/entry_id/session_id/since query params

backend_logs_summary.details: GET /api/waste/logs/summary returns summary with total_events, by_event_type (count/errors/avg_ms/mode_mix), errors[], slow_calls[], captures (total/vision_ok/vision_failed), timing_percentiles_ms (p50/p90/p99/max)

backend_sms_status.details: GET /api/waste/admin/sms/status returns credentials with has_auth_token:true, has_account_sid:false, has_from_number:false, configured:false, queued_count, sent_count

backend_video_mot.details: POST /api/waste/capture/video-mot requires frames, logs capture_video_mot_start and capture_video_mot_done events, returns 502 when Claude can't parse tiny images (no stub fallback)

backend_still_backwards_compat.details: POST /api/waste/capture/still without media_base64 uses stub (backwards compat), does not crash

backend_vision_llm_logging.details: Vision LLM logs have provider, model, duration_ms, mode, system_prompt_hash, user_prompt_preview, response_raw_preview

frontend_mobile_7_modes.details: Mobile /m/waste has 7 mode tiles: mode-video (default active), mode-still, mode-buffet-set, mode-buffet-refill, mode-buffet-close, mode-ground-truth, mode-draft-recipe

frontend_mobile_video_default.details: Video mode is default, CTA reads '🎥 Record a video scan', waste-video-input has accept='video/*' capture='environment'

frontend_mobile_mode_switching.details: Tapping mode-still changes CTA to 'Capture still', tapping mode-video reverts CTA

frontend_desktop_5_tabs.details: Desktop EchoWaste panel has 5 tabs: Capture Hub, Entries, Par Sheet, Daily Digest, Analysis Logs

frontend_analysis_logs_view.details: Analysis Logs tab renders: logs-kpis (Total events/Vision captures/Errors/p50-p99), logs-by-event breakdown, logs-filter select, logs-refresh button, logs-claude-digest button, logs-stream table, logs-autorefresh checkbox

frontend_logs_filter.details: Clicking logs-filter to 'vision_llm' filters the stream to only vision_llm events

frontend_copy_for_claude.details: Clicking '🤖 Copy for Claude' button triggers clipboard copy action
